edgeTriggerText: After this Company gains or loses 1+ Market
After you gain 1+ Influence in a State
Before you Play an Asset on this Company
Before you Play a Financial card
After you gain 3+ Influence in a State
After your Company wins a Clash
After an Action targets your token, card, or State
After each card you Develop, Focus, or Remove
After you win a Clash by 1 or 2
